roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Release with Coordinated Pickup
THE PEOPLE'S NOTICE OF MOT AND MOT TO CONSOLIDATE FILED

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SHER/SHER2:11-17-21/BAIL:1000/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/LDTR:12-17-21/X:JURY TRIAL ON 12-07-21 IS CONFIRMED/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT AND JURY TRIAL/DOP/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR: 12-17-21/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOMEDETENTION BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATEDPICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO LEAVE HOME FOR WORK OR DRUG TREATMENT,  DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTING AND COMPLY WITH STAY AWAY ORDERS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA4:ABERCOMBRIE AND FITCH AT 865 MARKET ST, SF/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE& JURY TRIAL WITH PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT/DOP/
